programmes.show_description: The famous ballerina Anna Pavlova is coming to Edinburgh. Miss Brodie insists that her girls experience this important cultural event.

programmes.show_name: The Kenny Everett Naughty Joke Box
programmes.show_description: Kenny Everett presents a gaggle of rather naughty comedians live from Soho! The set includes Willie Rushton and Leslie Crowther doing hard-core comedy routines. Guaranteed to offend!

programmes.show_name: Children Shouldn't Play with Dead Things
programmes.show_description: A horror film with brains albeit semi-digested! This cult American favourite from the 1970s sees a voodoo ritual go hideously wrong, summoning dead children from their graves to devour.
